meaning: n.部分,局部,零件,角色vt.分开,分离,分配vi.分开,断裂,分手adv.部分地,有几分adj.部分的,局部的
examples: She was very good in the part.
Have you learned your part yet?
The ferry is part of a small fleet of diesel-electric boats first launched in 1888.
Monletsgolia are one of 340 teams taking part in the deliberately eccentric Mongol Rally.
